title: ipomoea dubia
intro: Ipomoea dubia, also known as half-flowering morning glory, is a type of flowering vine native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antidiabetic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea dubia include its potential to help manage blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Ipomoea dubia can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
